product_name: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild: Link (Collector's edition)

bullets: Officially licensed Zelda: Breath of the Wild collectible statue — Link, Collector's Edition
Dynamic pose with Traveler's Bow ready to release an Ancient Arrow, based on official artwork
Equipped with Traveler's Shield, Soldier's Broadsword, arrow quiver, and Sheikah Slate
LED functions for the Sheikah Slate, base (Sheikah Eye symbol), and Ancient Arrow arrowhead
content.description:
The highly detailed Link PVC statue is inspired by the official artwork from The Legend of  Zelda : Breath of the Wild. Link is in this dynamic pose wielding the Traveler's Bow about to release an Ancient Arrow. On his back is the Traveler's Shield and the Soldier's Broadsword, and around his waist is a quiver of arrows and the Sheikah Slate, a device that aids him in his travels across Hyrule.
The design on the base is based on the Sheikah tribe's eye symbol that appears when activating the Sheikah Slate interface. The Collector's Edition of this statue comes with bright LED functions for the Sheikah Slate, the base, and the arrowhead of the Ancient Arrow.

attributes.whats_in_box:
• The Legend of Zelda : Breath of the Wild – Link PVC painted statue
• Highly detailed base inspired by The Legend of Zelda : Breath of the Wild art style
• LED features for the Ancient Arrow, Sheikah Slate, and base
• Collector’s Box
• F4F Leaflet with 500 F4F reward points included
